steps.title: Keep the subject intact
steps.content: The phrase the reason seeds from a dying dandelion appear to float in the air while falling is the sentence's subject. The main verb is is, so no punctuation should separate falling from that verb.

steps.title: Reject the punctuation break
steps.content: Choice A wrongly places a comma between the subject and verb. Choice B wrongly uses a colon after wording that is not an independent clause. Choice C wrongly uses a semicolon, which requires independent clauses on both sides. The answer is D.
